en: This condition checks if a SlimeWorld is loaded or not
Internally this just checks if a Bukkit world can be found.
Imports a vanilla Minecraft world into a Slime world using the provided loader.
This saves and loads the imported world.
Loads an existing SlimeWorld from the specified loader onto the server
Sets the value of a specific SlimeWorld property on a SlimePropertyMap.
The provided value must match the expected type for the property, mismatched types will produce an error.
Deletes a Slime world from the specified loader, removing it from storage permanently.
Loads a SlimeWorld object onto the server
Creates a new SlimeLoader instance for the specified loader type (file, MySQL, or MongoDB).
Creates a new SlimePropertyMap populated with the default values for all SlimeWorld properties.
This effect clones a SlimeWorld to another with the provided loader
You can specify if you want the clone to be readonly or pass in a new set of properties
Creates a new empty SlimeWorld and saves it to the specified loader.
You are required to load the world manually afterwards
Saves the current state of a loaded SlimeWorld to its configured loader.
Retrieves the value of a specific SlimeWorld property from a SlimePropertyMap.
Returns the names of all SlimeWorlds from the specified loader that are currently loaded on the server.
A Slime loader instance used to read/write worlds.
A Slime World instance
[SlimeLink] No official English guide provided.
Creates a new empty SlimeWorld and returns the SlimeWorld object.
The created world is not saved to its loader or loaded into Bukkit; it exists only in memory.
Use save or load effects when you need persistence or to make the world on the server.
Returns the Bukkit World for a loaded SlimeWorld by name.
The world must be loaded on the server, an empty result is returned if not found or not loaded.
Checks whether a SlimeWorld is stored in the provided SlimeLoader.
Asserts whether a SlimeWorld exists in a SlimeLoader.
If the assertion fails, a Skript runtime error is reported.
Unloads a loaded SlimeWorld from the server
Clones an existing Slime World and returns the cloned SlimeWorld object.
The clone is saved to the loader by default.
Use the 'not stored' option to prevent saving, the cloned world is also not loaded automatically.
Returns all world names currently stored in the specified SlimeLoader.
Returns whether a SlimeWorld exists in the specified SlimeLoader.
